description_long: This object is a modern range hood with a wide, angular canopy that tapers upward into a rectangular chimney. The main body is constructed from smooth, metallic material, likely stainless steel, with a subtle light blue-gray finish. The front features a slim, horizontal control panel, possibly digital, located centrally near the lower edge. Metal railings run along the left and right sides of the canopy, likely serving as guards or for hanging utensils. The chimney section is boxy and extends vertically, designed to channel air upward for ventilation. The overall design is sleek and minimalistic, suitable for contemporary urban kitchens.
description: A sleek, metallic range hood with a wide angular canopy, boxy chimney, and a slim front control panel. Side railings and a smooth blue-gray finish give it a modern, minimalistic look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide canopy, central control panel, and both side railings.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the sloped canopy and the vertical chimney, with one side railing visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the chimney and canopy, with no control panel or railings visible.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the sloped canopy and chimney, with the opposite side railing.
attribute_control_panel_type: digital touch panel located centrally on the lower front edge, rectangular and black in color.
attribute_vent_placement: Primary vent/exhaust opening is at the top of the chimney section, oriented vertically upward.
